subcodes.first_line: Say: By God! The Most Great Gate hath been opened before the faces of the nations in the Name of the Lord of Eternity. Enter ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل تالله قد فتح الباب الاعظم علی وجه الامم باسم مالک القدم ان ادخلوا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proclamation to the people of the world
